sglang.title: misc: add pre-commit config
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
motivation: automate the format
cc @merrymercy @Ying1123 @hnyls2002
ref https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/blob/main/scripts/format.sh
pip3 install pre-commit
cd sglang
pre-commit install .
pre-commit run --all-files
isort....................................................................Passed

vllm.title: [Doc][CI/Build] Update docs and tests to use `vllm serve`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up to #5090. As a sanity check, I have also updated the entrypoints tests to use the new CLI.
After this, we can update the Docker images and performance benchmarks to use the new CLI.
cc @EthanqX

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix for multinode crash on 4 PP
vllm.author: andoorve
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We needed to merge #6235 to allow for correct TP/PP rank assignment within a node. However, this caused our driver worker assignment to be out of sync now. This was partially fixed by #6399. However, the order of the TP drivers might be out of order causing the wrong worker to return the final answe

vllm.title: [TPU] Remove multi-modal args in TPU backend
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since the multi-modal model support has not been implemented nor tested on the TPU backend, the PR removes the multi-modal related code in the TPU backend for clarity.

vllm.title: [Misc] Use `torch.Tensor` for type annotation
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: A super minor fix that replaces torch.tensor with torch.Tensor in type annotations.

vllm.title: [Core] Refactor _prepare_model_input_tensors - take 2
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR refactors _prepare_model_input_tensors. Specifically, we introduce ModelRunnerInputBuilder mainly for logic isolation and modularization. Specifically, ModelRunnerInputBuilder manages all processed input data, including token IDs, positions, sequence length, etc, in one place, and isolates t

vllm.title: [Core] draft_model_runner: Implement prepare_inputs on GPU for advance_step
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR moves the implementation of prepare_inputs(..) for advance_step(..) (inside draft_model_runner.py) to GPU. It adds a new GPU kernel to modify prepare_inputs tensors on GPU directly, and also introduces some improvements to the sampler inside draft_model_runner to reduce unnecessary GPU<=>CPU

vllm.title: [ Kernel ] Fp8 Channelwise Weight Support
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

support channelwise scales for fp8 via compressed-tensors via cutlass kernels
note: on devices without support for cutlass (ada - for now), we cannot run these models. An alternative approach is to re-enable cutlass on these devices OR fall back to per tensor quantization

TEST PLAN:

manu

vllm.title: [BugFix] Avoid secondary error in ShmRingBuffer destructor
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
If there is an error setting up the shared memory in the ShmRingBuffer initializer, the destructor will raise an additional error:
[36m(RayWorkerWrapper pid=371, ip=10.128.21.6)[0m Exception ignored in: <function ShmRingBuffer.__del__ at 0x7f6ce44258a0>
[36m(RayWorkerWrapper pid=371, ip=10.128.21.6)

vllm.title: [Core] Introduce SPMD worker execution using Ray accelerated DAG
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This introduces an SPMD execution mode for Worker. In this mode, there is no longer a driver worker and the rank 0 worker is moved to a separate process. All workers are expected to take an ExecuteModelRequest input, instead of using NCCL as a control plane to receive inputs.
To keep the changes con
